title: Fennel Whisk Delight
description: A bitter, creamy Canadian dish featuring fennel bulb that is vegan-friendly and dairy-free.

ingredients.name: milk or alternative milk
ingredients.notes: such as almond, soy, or oat milk

ingredients.name: flax seeds
ingredients.notes: ground to create a vegan egg replacer

instructions: Gently steam or roast the fennel bulb until tender, about 20 minutes.
In a blender, combine steamed/fried fennel, milk (or alternative), flax seeds, coconut cream (if using), agave syrup, nutritional yeast, and cayenne pepper (optional).
Blend until smooth and creamy. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt as needed.
Pour into serving bowls or glasses and garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
